config.comments.config_version: Config version number, which will be automatically updated with the new features and generally does not need to be modified.
config.comments.config.allow_reload_base: Whether to allow reloading of the base modules.
config.comments.config.allow_request_pri: Whether to allow the bot to request local private IP addresses. (Prevent possible leakage)
config.comments.config.auto_purge_cronta: Cron expression for automatic cache purging.
config.comments.config.base_superuser: The bot's base superuser list. The values entered here will be loaded into the database when the bot starts.
config.comments.config.check_use_textsca: Whether to use Alibaba Cloud Content Security Text Scan 1.0 legacy API.
config.comments.config.command_prefix: Command prefix. The value entered here will be recognized as the command prefix.
config.comments.config.confirm_command: The keyword for the confirmation command. The value entered here will be recognized as the confirmation command.
config.comments.config.debug: Whether to enable debug mode, more log information will be output when enabled.
config.comments.config.enable_analytics: Whether to enable built-in statistics features.
config.comments.config.enable_commit_url: Whether to show the commit URL when displaying version information.
config.comments.config.enable_dirty_chec: Whether to enable text filtering detection, requires the AccessKey ID and AccessKey Secret of Alibaba Cloud Content Security Service.
config.comments.config.enable_joke: Whether to enable the joke. It will occur on April 1st server time when enabled.
config.comments.config.enable_module_inv: Whether to enable the prompt message when the module does not exist.
config.comments.config.enable_petal: Whether to enable the petal feature.
config.comments.config.enable_rickroll: Whether to rickroll the user when text filter detection fails.
config.comments.config.enable_tos: Whether to enable built-in ToS checking rules.
config.comments.config.enable_urlmanager: Whether to enable URLManager for URL springboard. (Declare that this URL is not an official link, etc.)
config.comments.config.ignored_sender: Ignored user list. Users matching this list will be ignored.
config.comments.config.mention_required: Whether to force processing of only of messages that mention the bot at the beginning of the message.
config.comments.config.no_confirm: Whether to execute the command without the sender confirming the message.
config.comments.config.petal_gained_limi: The maximum number of petals users can get per day.
config.comments.config.petal_lost_limit: The maximum number of petals users can lose per day.
config.comments.config.petal_sign_limit: The maximum number of petals users can get from signing in per day.
config.comments.config.petal_sign_rate: The probability of getting petals by signing in, ranging from 0 to 1, with an exponential decay in the number of petals to be obtained.
config.comments.config.quick_confirm: Whether to enable quick confirmation of message.
config.comments.config.report_targets: List of reporting contexts. The value filled in here will be identified as the reporting context. (e.g., when the bot encounters a command error, the bot will send the error information to the corresponding context)
config.comments.config.rickroll_msg: Rickroll message when text filter check fails.
config.comments.config.shuffle_rate: The random occurrence rate of jokes, ranging from 0 to 1.
config.comments.config.slower_schedule: Whether to enable a slower task scheduler. (To reduce request pressure)
config.comments.config.tos_temp_ban_time: Temporary ban duration for ToS violations.
config.comments.config.tos_warning_count: Maximum number of warnings for ToS violations.
config.comments.config.typo_check_args_s: The allowed similarity score for argument spelling check, ranging from 0 to 1.
config.comments.config.typo_check_comman: The allowed similarity score for command spelling check, ranging from 0 to 1.
config.comments.config.typo_check_module: The allowed similarity score for module spelling check, ranging from 0 to 1.
config.comments.config.typo_check_option: The allowed similarity score for option spelling check, ranging from 0 to 1.
config.comments.config.use_font_mirror: Whether to use font mirrors when rendering web pages.
config.comments.config.use_secrets_rando: Whether to use the random number generator based on the secrets library.
config.comments.secret.check_access_key_: The AccessKey ID of Alibaba Cloud Content Security Service.
The AccessKey Secret of Alibaba Cloud Content Security Service.
config.comments.secret.db_path: Database connection string, use the connection string format supported by Tortoise ORM.
config.comments.secret.ff3_key: The key used to encrypt sensitive information. (Encrypted using the ff3 algorithm, which may be used in some scenarios)
config.comments.secret.ff3_tweak: The key tweak used to encrypt sensitive information.
config.comments.webrender.browser_execut: The browser executable file path used by WebRender. If empty, the default browser installed by Playwright is used.
config.comments.webrender.browser_type: The browser type used by WebRender. (Supports "chrome" and "firefox")
config.comments.webrender.remote_only: Whether to use the remote WebRender service only.
config.comments.webrender.remote_web_ren: The URL of the remote WebRender service. Try the request if the local WebRender rendering fails.
config.header.line.2: NOTE: TOML is not like Python. Do not use Python syntax here.
config.header.line.3: EXAMPLE: Boolean values in TOML must be lowercase.
config.table.config: The basic config section. The values ​​entered here can be displayed in the message. Please do not enter sensitive information in this section.
config.table.config_bot: The basic config section of the client. The values ​​entered here can be displayed in the message. Please do not enter sensitive information in this section.
config.table.config_module: The basic config section of the module. The values ​​entered here can be displayed in the message. Please do not enter sensitive information in this section.
config.table.config_webrender: The basic config section of WebRender. The values ​​entered here can be displayed in the message. Please do not enter sensitive information in this section.
config.table.secret: The secret config section. The bot will try to intercept if the values here accidentally appears in the message sent, but be careful to prevent leakage.
config.table.secret_bot: The secret config section of the client. The bot will try to intercept if the values here accidentally appears in the message sent, but be careful to prevent leakage.
config.table.secret_module: The secret config section of the module. The bot will try to intercept if the values here accidentally appears in the message sent, but be careful to prevent leakage.
core.help.author: Author:
core.help.regex.note: This module supports regular expressions. The message will match with the following:
error.config.invalid: The config is invalid or not found. Please check the config file.
error.config.secret.not_found: The secret key is not found. Please check the config file.
error.config.webrender.invalid: No WebRender configured. This command cannot be used.
error.i18n.fallback: (If you see this placeholder, it means we've messed something up! Please report the issue so that we can fix it in time.)
error.message.chain.empty: The bot attempted to send an empty message. Please contact the bot owner to resolve this issue.
error.message.chain.unsafe: The message contains insecure content and has been blocked.
error.message.discord.dm.cannot_send: This command does not support sending messages in private chat. Please contact the developer.
error.message.discord.thread.permission_: Unable to send message. This is probably because the bot lacks sufficient permissions (create threads) in this channel.
error.message.limited: Failed to send message. The message might be blocked. Please try again later.
error.message.limited.msg2img: The message has been blocked. Try sending by image:
error.message.paused: Group message delivery was blocked by the server. Group message delivery is suspended. Use "${prefix}resume" to resume pushing.
error.message.prompt: An error occurred while executing the command:
error.message.prompt.external: This error may be caused by external systems. If the error occurs repeatedly, please report the following message to the bot owner.
error.message.prompt.noreport: This error is not caused by the bot and thus should not be reported to the bot owner.
error.message.prompt.report: Please report the following message to the bot owner.
error.message.report: The following error occurred while executing "${command}":
error.message.timeout: Message sending timed out. Please retry the command later or wait for the result to be returned.
error.module.helpdoc_invalid: "${module}" module provided invalid help information. Please contact the developers to solve this issue.
error.module.unbound: "${module}" module is not bound with any commands and doesn't have a description. Please contact the developers to solve this issue.
game.message.running: This game is currently in progress.
game.message.stop.none: This game is not in progress.
loader.load.failed: The following error occurred during modules loading and module(s) with error were not loaded:
message.cooldown: You need to wait ${time} second(s) before executing this command again.
message.cooldown.manual: This context has been set to wait ${time} second(s) before executing the commands again.
message.embed.author: Author:
message.id.init.sender.confirm: This user does not exist. Initialize?
message.id.init.target.confirm: This context does not exist. Initialize?
message.id.invalid.sender: Invalid ID format. The format should be "${sender}|<User ID>".
message.id.invalid.target: Invalid ID format. The format should be "${target}|<Context ID>".
message.reply.prompt: (Please quote this message to reply using the specified words)
message.wait.confirm.prompt: (Send a confirmation word such as "Yes" to confirm)
message.wait.confirm.prompt.qq: (Send a confirmation word such as "Yes", press emoji reactions or double-click the avatar to confirm)
message.wait.confirm.prompt.reaction: (Send a confirmation word such as "Yes" or press emoji reactions to confirm)
parser.admin.permission.denied.command: This command can only be used by the admins of the context. Please contact the admins to execute this command.
parser.admin.permission.denied.module: Commands under the "${module}" module can only be used by the admins of the context. Please contact the admins to execute the command.
parser.command.fixup.confirm:
Did you mean "${command}"?
(Command syntax corrections only, no guarantee of expected results)
parser.command.running.prompt: There are currently commands executing. Please try again later.
parser.command.running.prompt2: The previous command is still being executed.
parser.module.disabled: "${module}" module is not enabled. Please contact the admins to enable this module.
parser.module.disabled.prompt: "${module}" module is not enabled. Please use "${prefix}enable ${module}" to enable this module.
parser.module.disabled.to_enable: Do you want to enable the module and continue executing this command?
parser.module.unloaded: "${module}" hasn't been loaded yet. Please contact the developers to solve this issue.
parser.superuser.permission.denied: You do not have permission to use this command.
petal.message.gained.limit: However, the daily limit of petals obtained today has been reached. Please try again tomorrow.
tos.message.appeal: For objections, please go to ${issue_url} and create an issue.
tos.message.banned: Your account has been blocked since the number of warnings you have triggered exceeds the maximum limit. Your request will be ignored after this message.
tos.message.in_group_blocklist: This group is in the group blacklist. Automatically left.
tos.message.reason.abuse: Too many command usages within a period of time.
tos.message.reason.cooldown: Too many usages of the same command within a period of time.
tos.message.reason.kick: Kick the bot from the group.
tos.message.reason.restrict: Impose unfriendly restrictions on the bot.
tos.message.report: User ${sender} triggered an abuse warning in context ${target}.
tos.message.tempbanned:
Note:
We have temporarily banned you because your action triggered a warning.
${ban_time} second(s) remaining until being unbanned.
tos.message.tempbanned.warning:
Note:
Although the temporary ban was triggered, using commands may still cause you to be warned again.
${ban_time} second(s) remaining until being unbanned.
tos.message.warning:
Warning:
You have violated our Code of Conduct according to our Terms of Service.
tos.message.warning.prompt: Your account will be blocked if you receive more than ${warn_counts} warnings.
